mission.title: vllm: [Kernel] FlashMLA integration
mission.description:
Integrate: https://github.com/deepseek-ai/FlashMLA

currently requires

```
export VLLM_ATTENTION_BACKEND=FLASHMLA
```
and
```
block_size=64
```

TODO:

- ~cuda-graphs are broken~
- future PR: enforce block_size 64 gracefully

steps.description:

steps.title: Apply the configuration
steps.description:
Apply the following configuration to your cluster:
```yaml
export VLLM_ATTENTION_BACKEND=FLASHMLA
```

steps.title: Review the fix
steps.description: The fix was implemented in https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/13867. Review the changes to understand the solution.

steps.title: Verify the fix
steps.description: Confirm that the issue is resolved in your environment by testing the affected functionality.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with vllm installed or the issue environment reproducible.
